description: A project has been approved and the project manager needs to set the initial schedule as the official baseline for performance measurement.

nodes.task_description: Open the final, agreed-upon project schedule.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the correct schedule file.

nodes.task_description: Use the system command to set the current schedule as 'Baseline 1'.
Verify that the baseline has been created and is now read-only.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the baseline is saved and cannot be edited, and future progress will be measured against it.
